concept: Craft me a game where you're a timekeeper repairing broken moments in history by manipulating hourglasses of various sizes. Each hourglass controls a different aspect of time—speed, direction, localized loops—allowing you to solve temporal paradoxes by precise sand management. Temporal distortions manifest as visual glitches that spread if left unchecked, corrupting causality throughout the timeline. Journey through pivotal historical events that are fragmenting due to mysterious chrono-sabotage by an unknown rival timekeeper.
